name: Lady Baltimore Cake II
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until smooth and creamy.
2. Gradually add the sifted sugar to the butter, beating until well combined.
3. Sift together the cake flour, baking powder, and salt; set aside.
4. Mix equal parts milk and water in a separate bowl.
5. Alternately add the milk-water mixture and the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, beating after each addition.
6. Stir in the vanilla extract and orange flavoring.
7. Gently fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites until just combined.
8. Pour the batter into well-oiled layer cake pans.
9. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for about 35 minutes.
10. Fill between layers with fruit and nuts, then top and sides with boiled icing.
